mapper.select: SELECT fi.FEATURED_SN, fi.PROD_TYPE, fi.PROD_SN, fi.CUSTOM_IMG, fi.CUSTOM_DESC, fi.SORT_ORD, fi.RGTR_ID, fi.REG_DT, COALESCE(c.COURSE_NM, t.TEXTBOOK_NM) AS NAME, COALESCE(c.COURSE_PRICE, t.SALE_PRC_AMT) AS PRICE, COALESCE(c.THMB_IMG, t.THMB_IMG) AS ORIGIN_IMG, COALESCE(c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, t.TAGLINE) AS ORIGIN_DESC, instr.INSTR_UUID AS INSTR_UUID FROM FEATURED_ITEM fi LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'COURSE' AND fi.PROD_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN TEXTBOOK t ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'TEXTBOOK' AND fi.PROD_SN = t.TEXTBOOK_SN LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR instr ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = instr.INSTR_USER_ID ORDER BY fi.SORT_ORD OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT fi.FEATURED_SN, fi.PROD_TYPE, fi.PROD_SN, fi.CUSTOM_IMG, fi.CUSTOM_DESC, fi.SORT_ORD, fi.RGTR_ID, fi.REG_DT, COALESCE(c.COURSE_NM, t.TEXTBOOK_NM) AS NAME, COALESCE(c.COURSE_PRICE, t.SALE_PRC_AMT) AS PRICE, COALESCE(c.THMB_IMG, t.THMB_IMG) AS ORIGIN_IMG, COALESCE(c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, t.TAGLINE) AS ORIGIN_DESC, instr.INSTR_UUID AS INSTR_UUID FROM FEATURED_ITEM fi LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'COURSE' AND fi.PROD_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN TEXTBOOK t ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'TEXTBOOK' AND fi.PROD_SN = t.TEXTBOOK_SN LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR instr ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = instr.INSTR_USER_ID ORDER BY fi.SORT_ORD

SELECT fi.FEATURED_SN, fi.PROD_TYPE, fi.PROD_SN, fi.CUSTOM_IMG, fi.CUSTOM_DESC, fi.SORT_ORD, fi.RGTR_ID, fi.REG_DT, COALESCE(c.COURSE_NM, t.TEXTBOOK_NM) AS NAME, COALESCE(c.COURSE_PRICE, t.SALE_PRC_AMT) AS PRICE, COALESCE(c.THMB_IMG, t.THMB_IMG) AS ORIGIN_IMG, COALESCE(c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, t.TAGLINE) AS ORIGIN_DESC, instr.INSTR_UUID AS INSTR_UUID FROM FEATURED_ITEM fi LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'COURSE' AND fi.PROD_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN TEXTBOOK t ON fi.PROD_TYPE = 'TEXTBOOK' AND fi.PROD_SN = t.TEXTBOOK_SN LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR instr ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = instr.INSTR_USER_ID WHERE fi.FEATURED_SN = #{featuredSn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FEATURED_ITEM WHERE PROD_TYPE = #{prodType}

SELECT 'COURSE' AS PROD_TYPE, COURSE_SN AS PROD_SN, COURSE_NM AS NAME, COURSE_PRICE AS PRICE, NULL AS FEATURED_SN, NULL AS CUSTOM_IMG, NULL AS CUSTOM_DESC, 0 AS SORT_ORD, NULL AS RGTR_ID, NULL AS REG_DT, NULL AS ORIGIN_IMG, NULL AS ORIGIN_DESC FROM COURSE WHERE OPNN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COURSE_NM

SELECT 'TEXTBOOK' AS PROD_TYPE, TEXTBOOK_SN AS PROD_SN, TEXTBOOK_NM AS NAME, SALE_PRC_AMT AS PRICE, NULL AS FEATURED_SN, NULL AS CUSTOM_IMG, NULL AS CUSTOM_DESC, 0 AS SORT_ORD, NULL AS RGTR_ID, NULL AS REG_DT, NULL AS ORIGIN_IMG, NULL AS ORIGIN_DESC FROM TEXTBOOK WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TEXTBOOK_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FEATURED_ITEM (PROD_TYPE, PROD_SN, CUSTOM_IMG, CUSTOM_DESC, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, REG_DT) VALUES ( #{prodType}, #{prodSn}, #{customImg}, #{customDesc}, NVL(#{sortOrd}, 0), #{rgtrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
